## Analyzers (5)

### [MetaDefenderCloud_Scan v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/MetaDefender/MetaDefenderCloud_Scan.json)
Scan a file with MetaDefender Cloud

- **Author:** Davide Arcuri and Andrea Garavaglia, LDO-CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `file`
